title: Air defense active
description: Flash revealed an unusual Russian tactic - they launch "Herbers" that allow themselves to be shot down 😏 As the adviser to the Minister of Defense of Ukraine explained, such a situation has been observed for the past week. At the same time, such drones are equipped with cameras and modems. "I believe that the enemy is studying the tactics and types of our interceptors. They are looking for corridors for the Shaheds. Perhaps the collection of data sets for training continues...
description_en: Flash revealed an unusual Russian tactic - they launch "Herbers" that allow themselves to be shot down 😏 As the adviser to the Minister of Defense of Ukraine explained, such a situation has been observed for the past week. At the same time, such drones are equipped with cameras and modems. "I believe that the enemy is studying the tactics and types of our interceptors. They are looking for corridors for the Shaheds. Perhaps the collection of data sets for training continues...
description_uk: Флеш раскрыл необычную тактику русни - запускают "Герберы", которые позволяют себя сбивать 😏 Как пояснил советник министра обороны Украины, такая ситуация наблюдается в течение последней недели. При этом такие дроны оснащены камерами и модемами. "Считаю, что противник изучает тактику и типы наших перехватчиков. Ищет коридоры для "Шахедов". Возможно, продолжается сбор наборов данных для обучения...

title: Kyiv: Casualties reported
description: Update: Death toll rises to 11 following Russia’s massive attack on Kyiv, region. The number of people killed in Russia’s overnight missile and drone attack has risen to 11, local authorities reported on July 6, after emergency crews recovered more victims from the rubble of struck residential buildings. At least 46 others have been reported injured across the capital and the surrounding region.
description_en: Update: Death toll rises to 11 following Russia’s massive attack on Kyiv, region. The number of people killed in Russia’s overnight missile and drone attack has risen to 11, local authorities reported on July 6, after emergency crews recovered more victims from the rubble of struck residential buildings. At least 46 others have been reported injured across the capital and the surrounding region.

The number of people killed in Russia’s overnight missile and drone attack has risen to 11, local authorities reported on July 6, after emergency crews recovered more victims from the rubble of struck residential buildings. At least 46 others have been reported injured across the capital and the surrounding region.

title: Donetsk: 37 missiles intercepted
description: 363 TARGETS DESTROYED/SUPPRESSED: 37 MISSILES AND 326 ENEMY UAVs On the night of July 6 (from 18:00 on July 5), the enemy launched a massive combined attack on Ukraine using attack UAVs, air-, land-, and sea-based missiles of various types. ❗️ The main direction of the attack is Kyiv. A total of 419 means of air attack - 68 missiles and 351 unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) were recorded by the Air Force's radio engineering troops...
description_en: 363 TARGETS DESTROYED/SUPPRESSED: 37 MISSILES AND 326 ENEMY UAVs On the night of July 6 (from 18:00 on July 5), the enemy launched a massive combined attack on Ukraine using attack UAVs, air-, land-, and sea-based missiles of various types. ❗️ The main direction of the attack is Kyiv. A total of 419 means of air attack - 68 missiles and 351 unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) were recorded by the Air Force's radio engineering troops...

Усього радіотехнічними військами Повітряних Сил зафіксовано 419 засобів повітряного нападу – 68 ракет і 351 БпЛА...

title: Bucha: 6 injured
description: Update: At least 6 injured in large-scale attack on Kyiv, surrounding region. At least three people have been injured in the capital, Kyiv Mayor Vitali Klitschko reported amid Russia's large-scale attack on the capital. Three others were also injured in Bucha, located in Kyiv Oblast west of the capital.

description: 🇵🇱 Poland will declassify data on all military aid to Ukraine 👥 Minister of Defense of Poland Władysław Kosiniak-Kamysh instructed to declassify data on military aid to Ukraine for the years 2022-2026. The decision was made after consultation with Prime Minister Donald Tusk. In addition, the Polish Military Counterintelligence Service (SKW) will investigate the disclosure of state secrets. 🖋 The process of transferring equipment to Ukraine...
description_en: 🇵🇱 Poland will declassify data on all military aid to Ukraine 👥 Minister of Defense of Poland Władysław Kosiniak-Kamysh instructed to declassify data on military aid to Ukraine for the years 2022-2026. The decision was made after consultation with Prime Minister Donald Tusk. In addition, the Polish Military Counterintelligence Service (SKW) will investigate the disclosure of state secrets. 🖋 The process of transferring equipment to Ukraine...
description_uk: 🇵🇱 Польща розсекретить дані про всю військову допомогу Україні 👥 Міністр оборони Польщі Владислав Косіняк-Камиш доручив розсекретити дані про військову допомогу Україні за 2022–2026 роки. Рішення ухвалене після консультації з прем’єр-міністром Дональдом Туском. Крім того, польська Служба військової контррозвідки (SKW) розслідуватиме розкриття державної таємниці. 🖋 Процес передачі техніки Україні...

title: Crimea: Energy infrastructure hit
